message:
test(conformance): add SDK event ordering, tool lifecycle, JSON schema, and cross-surface parity test suites

SDK integration conformance tests (tests/sdk_integration.rs):
- sdk_conformance_event_ordering: validate AgentStart→TurnStart→
  MessageStart→MessageUpdate*→MessageEnd→TurnEnd→AgentEnd lifecycle
  ordering matches pi-mono's event contract
- sdk_conformance_tool_event_ordering: validate ToolExecutionStart→
  ToolExecutionUpdate*→ToolExecutionEnd ordering with tool name
  consistency across start/end
- sdk_conformance_agent_event_json_schema: verify all AgentEvent
  variants serialize with snake_case type tags and no uppercase in
  type field, matching pi-mono JSON protocol
- sdk_conformance_session_tool_hooks: validate typed tool hooks
  (on_tool_start/on_tool_end) fire during prompt execution via
  from_session_with_listeners
- sdk_conformance_combined_callback_ordering: verify session-level
  subscribers fire before per-prompt callbacks for the same event
- sdk_extensions_load_and_expose_registration_surface: test extension
  loading, command registration, flag registration, and command
  execution through the SDK handle
- sdk_extension_policy_safe_denies_exec_and_records_hostcall_telemetry:
  verify safe policy denies exec, records security alert with correct
  category, and short-circuits runtime-risk telemetry

Helper additions:
- write_sdk_extension() for creating test extension .mjs files
- SecurityAlertCategory import for policy denial assertions

Cross-surface parity tests (tests/cross_surface_parity.rs, new):
- 662-line DROPIN-174 test suite validating invariants across CLI,
  config, session, and error subsystems
- Exit code classification exhaustiveness for all Error variants
- Error category_code stability
- Session message serialization round-trips

JSON mode parity tests (tests/json_mode_parity.rs, new):
- 1158-line bd-37u8a PARITY-V1 smoke test suite
- Validates all 15 AgentEvent types emit correct JSON schema
- Verifies camelCase field naming throughout
- Validates lifecycle event ordering
- SessionHeader verification

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
